# autoimprove.config.md
<!-- Auto-generated by /autoimprove:setup — edit to customise -->
<!-- This is an EXAMPLE for a Next.js + TypeScript project -->

## Stack
- Language: TypeScript
- Framework: Next.js 15
- Package manager: pnpm

## Measurement Commands

### Type Check (40 pts)
```bash
npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1
```
Error pattern: `grep -c "error TS"`
Penalty: 4 pts per error (min 0)

### Build (20 pts)
```bash
pnpm build 2>&1
```
Success pattern: exit code 0

### Tests (30 pts)
```bash
pnpm test -- --passWithNoTests 2>&1
```
Parse pattern: look for `X passed`, `X failed` in output
Formula: `(passed / total) * 30`
Fallback if no tests: 15/30 (encourages adding tests)

### Lint (10 pts)
```bash
pnpm lint 2>&1
```
Error pattern: `grep -c "error"`
Penalty: 2 pts per error (min 0)

## Improvement Areas
- Fix TypeScript `any` types — replace with proper interfaces
- Add missing `loading.tsx` and `error.tsx` for each route
- Ensure all Convex mutations check `ctx.auth.getUserIdentity()` before writing
- Replace raw `<img>` tags with `next/image`
- Extract duplicated fetch logic into shared hooks
- Add `metadata` exports to pages missing them
- Lazy-load heavy components with `next/dynamic`
- Add input validators (`v.string()`, `v.number()`, etc.) to Convex mutations that lack them

## Files to Never Modify
- package-lock.json
- pnpm-lock.yaml
- convex/schema.ts
- convex/_generated/
- .env
- .env.local
- next-env.d.ts
